working: scout-extract-mentions: extractTracksFromText() extracts all track mentions from scout text via Haiku, saves to reference_tracks as checkout with ilike dedup
brain-loadentries-onmount: onMount is async, awaits loadEntries(), debug console.logs removed
fix-reference-tracks-order: reference_tracks query orders by created_at DESC — null tempo tracks load correctly
scout-tracks-checkout: /agent-scout endpoint saves result.tracks (kworb) to reference_tracks (ilike dedup, collection_name scout_YYYY-MM-DD, source checkout)
sync-project-refs: POST /sync-project-refs reads project_meta.reference_links, Essentia-analyzes each Spotify URL, saves with source:'agent'
fix-vocal-eq-header-click: vocal-eq-section position:relative z-index:1, vocal-eq-header position:relative z-index:2 pointer-events:all
vocalEqStatus per-song + reset button when stuck at 'separating'
remove-checkout-banner: CHECK OUT TODAY banner + pulse dot fully removed
partial: vocal-eq-stems: SQL migration not yet run — vocal_eq_curves missing stem_type and source_type columns
checkout_date column: may not exist in reference_tracks — run SQL: ALTER TABLE reference_tracks ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS checkout_date timestamptz;
next: Run both SQL migrations in Supabase dashboard: (1) ALTER TABLE vocal_eq_curves ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stem_type text DEFAULT 'vocals', ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source_type text DEFAULT 'mix'; (2) ALTER TABLE reference_tracks ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS checkout_date timestamptz;
notes: Scout now saves tracks two ways: kworb chart tracks (with audio metadata) + all text-mentioned tracks (via Haiku extraction). Both use ilike dedup and collection_name scout_YYYY-MM-DD.
